isolation.runtimeNames: Each CLI rerun used unique config_name, router_name, review_supervisor_name, and task_supervisor_name values.

assertions.title: Bench override changes the end-to-end review plan

steps.action: Run the same fixture ref range with default bench settings through a deterministic CLI wrapper.
steps.expected: CLI review completes and records the baseline selected team for the resolved refs.
steps.observed: CLI completed with baseline selected team ['trace', 'guard', 'craft'] for resolved refs shared by both reruns.

steps.action: Re-run the identical ref range with a reviewer-bench override disabling atlas/craft/fuse and changing routing bench composition.
steps.expected: Resolved refs stay the same while planner selection and reviewer execution change to the override bench.
steps.observed: Override rerun preserved resolved refs=True and changed selected team from ['trace', 'guard', 'craft'] to ['trace', 'guard', 'proof'].

assertions.title: Provider/model/prompt override changes end-to-end execution settings

steps.action: Run the same fixture ref range with default execution settings through a deterministic CLI wrapper.
steps.expected: CLI review completes and records the baseline selected team and reviewer execution settings.
steps.observed: CLI completed with selected team ['trace', 'guard', 'craft'] and baseline trace execution openrouter/kimi_k2_5.

steps.action: Re-run the identical ref range with deterministic provider/model/prompt/template overrides applied only to reviewer trace.
steps.expected: Resolved refs and selected team stay the same while the trace execution settings change and unrelated reviewer settings remain stable.
steps.observed: Override rerun preserved resolved refs=True and selected team=True; trace changed from openrouter/kimi_k2_5 to deterministic/deterministic_review while guard remained stable=True.
